_doc: TINY synthetic coherence/perplexity passages (Axis 3). Hand-written, clearly-synthetic neutral prose, NOT WikiText. 10 short passages.
passages: The small town sat beside a quiet river where children played each summer afternoon.
A library keeps many books on tall wooden shelves arranged by subject and author.
Every morning the baker opened the shop and the warm smell of bread filled the street.
Mountains rise slowly over millions of years as great plates of rock push together.
The teacher explained that plants turn sunlight into food through a process called growth.
On clear nights the stars appear as tiny points of light scattered across the dark sky.
Trains carry passengers between cities along long steel rails laid across the countryside.
A gentle rain fell on the garden and the flowers opened their petals toward the gray sky.
The old clock in the hall ticked steadily, marking each hour with a soft chiming bell.
Scientists study the weather to understand how wind, heat, and water shape the climate.
